series_metadata.series_description: This record retention schedule consists of statements received from financial institutions that have liquidated shares of stock reported to the Division of Unclaimed Funds as dormant.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 6 months after the close of the fiscal year in which sale proceeds are received. ; Electronic: Stock sale statements are imaged no later than six months following the close of he fiscal year in which the stock sale proceeds are reported to the Director., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
